title: Account Currency Assignment
description: The system shall require each account to have exactly one ISO 4217 currency code assigned at creation time. The currency shall be selected from a predefined list of common currencies presented in the account creation UI. The currency field shall be mandatory; the system SHALL NOT allow an account to be saved without a currency code. Once saved, the account currency shall be immutable.
acceptance_criteria: Account creation form presents a currency picker with common ISO 4217 codes (e.g., EUR, USD, SEK, GBP, CHF, JPY, CAD, AUD)
Saving an account without selecting a currency is rejected with a validation error
AccountEntity in the database stores a non-null currency_code column
UI does not allow editing the currency of an existing account
